title: Piquant Shrimp Tacos
description: A flavorful and spicy twist on traditional tacos, featuring succulent shrimp in a zesty Thai-inspired sauce.
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add shrimp and cook until pink, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Remove shrimp from skillet and set aside.
In the same skillet, add curry paste and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add tom yum soup mix and cook for an additional minute.
Add piquant sauce and stir to combine.
Return shrimp to skillet and toss with sauce.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Warm tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble tacos by placing a few shrimp onto a tortilla, followed by a sprinkle of cilantro and a squeeze of lime juice.
